_comment: MCP Server config untuk Google Antigravity — project ini
_instructions: Cara install: Antigravity → ... menu (kiri atas) → MCP Servers → Manage MCP Servers → View raw config
Copy-paste JSON ini, ganti placeholder [VALUE] dengan nilai asli
JANGAN commit file ini jika sudah ada credentials — tambahkan ke .gitignore

context7._description: Inject docs real-time 9.000+ library langsung ke context agent. Solusi untuk Prisma 7 / Next.js 16 breaking changes.
context7._usage: Tambahkan 'use context7' di akhir prompt, atau 'use library /vercel/next.js' untuk spesifik.

env.CONTEXT7_API_KEY: [OPTIONAL — daftar gratis di context7.com/dashboard untuk higher rate limits]

github._description: Buat issue, baca PR, cek commits, manage labels langsung dari IDE tanpa buka browser.
github._usage: Contoh: 'Create a GitHub issue for this bug', 'Show open PRs', 'List issues labeled bug'
github._setup: Generate Personal Access Token di github.com/settings/tokens — scope: repo, read:org

postgresql._description: Baca schema PostgreSQL, test query, inspect data langsung dari IDE. Agent tahu nama kolom yang benar.
postgresql._usage: Contoh: 'Show schema of orders table', 'Run this query and check result', 'What indexes exist on user table?'
postgresql._warning: Gunakan DATABASE_URL development/staging, JANGAN production untuk MCP

playwright._description: Browser automation — agent buka browser, isi form, screenshot, test UI otomatis. E2E testing tanpa tulis test manual.
playwright._usage: Contoh: 'Test the checkout flow', 'Screenshot the dashboard', 'Fill and submit the login form'

sentry._description: Baca production errors dari Sentry langsung ke context IDE. Fix bug tanpa buka browser.
sentry._usage: Contoh: 'Show latest errors in production', 'What's causing this Sentry issue ID?'
sentry._setup: Buat Sentry Auth Token di sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens

docker._description: Manage Docker containers, inspect logs, restart services langsung dari IDE. Berguna untuk debug PostgreSQL/Redis di Coolify.
docker._usage: Contoh: 'Show running containers', 'Get logs from postgres container', 'Restart redis container'

firecrawl._description: Web scraping — ambil docs, riset kompetitor, scrape data untuk seed database. Handles JavaScript-rendered pages.
firecrawl._usage: Contoh: 'Scrape docs from xendit.co/api', 'Get competitor pricing from their website'
firecrawl._setup: Daftar di firecrawl.dev untuk API key (ada free tier)

notion._description: Akses Notion pages/databases dari IDE. Berguna jika PRD atau backlog di Notion.
notion._usage: Contoh: 'Show current sprint tasks from Notion', 'Create a new task in backlog database'
notion._setup: Buat Notion Integration di notion.so/my-integrations, share workspace ke integration

slack._description: Search, read, dan kirim Slack messages dari IDE. Berguna untuk check diskusi tim tentang bug tertentu.
slack._usage: Contoh: 'Search Slack for messages about payment bug', 'Post update to #dev channel'
slack._setup: Buat Slack App di api.slack.com/apps dengan scope: channels:read, chat:write, search:read
